rule_hits.summary: Lists the references cited in the paper, including academic papers and technical reports on LLMs, retrieval-augmented generation, and related topics.
Acknowledges support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China and the CAS Project for Young Scientists in Basic Research, as well as sponsorship for Xianpei Han.
The paper investigates the impact of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) on large language models (LLMs) by analyzing their performance in noise robustness, negative rejection,...
